Dear Dr. Lee,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Evergreen Innovations Pte. Ltd. Your starting salary will be SGD 120,000 per annum, payable in accordance with our standard payroll practices. 

Your expected start date is 1 October 2023. Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning this letter by 22 September 2023. Should you have any questions, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@evergreen.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Sincerely,

Mr. John Tan  
Head of Human Resources  
Evergreen Innovations Pte. Ltd.  

[Signature Block for Acceptance]
